title: EnchantsPro
description: EnchantsPro is a high-performance engine designed to expand Minecraft's mechanics while maintaining the integrity of the vanilla experience.
body:
# 👑 EnchantsPro
### *The Definitive Custom Enchantment Suite for Modern Servers*

**EnchantsPro** is a high-performance engine designed to expand Minecraft's mechanics while maintaining the integrity of the vanilla experience. Built from the ground up for **Paper** and **Spigot**, it offers a seamless, lag-free experience for players and unparalleled control for administrators.

---

## 💎 Elite Features

### 🛠️ The Physical Arsenal
* **[Trench I - II]** | The ultimate excavation tool. Level II features **Smart-Axis Detection**, allowing players to clear 3x3 areas horizontally or vertically based on their look-angle.
* **[Timber I - II]** | Redefine forestry. Features a **Non-Blocking Wave Engine** that fells entire trees and clears foliage smoothly without dropping server TPS.
* **[VeinMiner]** | Chain-reaction mining for all ore types. Intelligently identifies veins to save time and durability.
* **[Silk Touch II]** | Master the spawners. Safely extract Mob Spawners with their **NBT Data intact**—including a custom lime-accented item UI that tracks the mob type.
* **[Smelter]** | High-efficiency processing. Instantly converts raw ores into refined ingots upon breakage.
* **[Telepathy]** | Zero-waste mining. Logic-gate integration ensures drops are funneled directly to the player's inventory, bypassing world-drop entities.

### 🔋 Passive & Utility Augments
* **[Magnet I - III]** | A persistent background task that pulls dropped items toward the player. Optimized to run asynchronously to protect your performance.
* **[Haste I - II]** | Dynamic potion-effect injection. Grants Mining Fatigue immunity and Haste buffs instantly when the tool is drawn.
* **[Experience I - III]** | Sophisticated XP scaling. Multiplies orb drops to reward dedicated miners with up to 150% bonus XP.

---

## ⚙️ Professional Administration & Configuration
We believe server owners should have total authority over their economy. Our `config.yml` provides granular control over every aspect of the plugin:

* **Dynamic Distribution:** Toggle and tune the percentage-based injection of custom books into:
    * **Enchanting Tables** (Post-enchantment roll logic).
    * **Villager Trade Tables** (Custom librarian profession scaling).
    * **Loot Tables** (Dungeons, Mineshafts, and Ancient Cities).
* **Enchantment Logic:** Enable or disable specific enchantments globally with a single toggle.
* **Compatibility Toggles:** Decide if powerful combos (like Trench + VeinMiner) are allowed or restricted to prevent over-powered gameplay.
* **Modern Formatting:** Full **MiniMessage** support for all plugin messages, allowing for modern RGB gradients and clean, scannable text.

---

## 🚀 Technical Excellence
* **PDC Storage:** Uses the **Persistent Data Container** API. Data is stored natively on items—no external databases, no lag, no data loss.
* **Anvil Engine:** Custom logic for book combination. Merge lower-level books to upgrade gear, respecting vanilla-style cost scaling.
* **Async Processing:** Heavy tasks like the Magnet engine and Timber leaf-decay are handled outside the main server thread to ensure **20.0 TPS** even under heavy load.

---

### 📦 Installation & Commands
1. Drop the `EnchantsPro.jar` into your `/plugins/` folder.
2. Restart the server to generate the refined `config.yml`.
3. Use `/ep give <player> <enchant> <level>` to distribute items.
4. Use `/ep reload` to apply config changes instantly.
